creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
I just noticed that this line got into the patch:

 .if ${PYTHON_REL} >= 250
-IGNORE= ctypes ships with Python 2.5.x
+#IGNORE=        ctypes ships with Python 2.5.x
 .endif
	It shouldn't have been there (I was trying to test with python 2.6 on my machine).
Thanks,
-Garrett=
